creator: sblachmann@gmail.com
text:
One longstanding hassle with setting up FreeBSD is gpart and its bugs.
For example, gpart frequently fails to create partitions for unknown reasons.
It then always prints "Invalid argument" when the arguments are perfectly correct, and some bug makes it fail.

It is highly annoying and embarassing to see that FreeBSD has deteriorated that much that it is not even capable to set up partitions, and the need to have a Linux live CD handy, just for setting up drives.

Suggested solution:
So, in case of failure in spite of valid arguments please have gpart print diagnostics information instead of "Invalid argument" and ask the user to file a bug report against gpart.
